about.headline: I treat your move like it's my own.
bioParagraphs: I'm {agentName}, an agent with {brokerage} based in {primaryArea}. After years of watching buyers get talked into homes they couldn't comfortably afford, I built my whole practice around the opposite: clear numbers, honest timelines, and zero pressure.
Whether you're buying your first place or selling a home you've outgrown, I'll walk you through every step — financing, inspections, negotiation — in plain language.

testimonials.quote: Made our first home purchase feel manageable instead of terrifying. Explained every fee before it surprised us.
testimonials.name: Priya & Dev S.

testimonials.quote: Sold our place in 11 days, $14k over ask. Communicated constantly, never once felt rushed into a decision.
testimonials.name: Marcus T.

testimonials.quote: I'd recommend them to anyone nervous about the process. Patient, sharp on the numbers, easy to reach.
testimonials.name: Aisha R.
